race.description: Michelin Service Centre Warrnambool Highweight Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: DUKE OF CLARENCE (3) was too good for a maiden field last start over 2000m at this track, scoring by 1.75 lengths in what was a richly-deserved win. Up in grade, but it'd surprise if he didn't measure up given he's at the top of his game. SMILING ASSASSIN (1) knuckled down strongly to get within 3/4 of a length of the winner last start over 2000m at this track. That was only the second run back from a spell so there'd still be improvement to come. SHOGUN EXPRESS (2) found the line nicely last start to get up for third over 2200m at Donald. Among the leading chances. STEP IN TIME (6) ran below expectations last time at Werribee, finishing sixth and beaten 5.5 lengths, but should be ready to fire now third-up. EYES TO ME (9) is also third-up and is up in grade a touch here but will be fitter and draws the inside.
